reasons: Pipeline runs end-to-end (success rate 1.0), validating the engineering path.
Main hypothesis H1 (downstream causal cost) was not falsified; the pilot simply did not test it.
H2 (first-letter benchmark unrepresentative) is strongly supported by degenerate proxy results (0.0 for 26/27 checkpoints).
Candidate A scores 3.85, meeting the ADVANCE threshold (>= 3.5).
Candidate B is untested and its core hypothesis was refuted in result debate; it is subsumed by cand_a.
Candidate C violates the training-free constraint and scores 1.00.
next_actions: Integrate proper sae-spelling / SAEBench absorption metric instead of the simplified proxy.
Increase activation corpus to >= 50k tokens for reliable dead-neuron detection.
Commit to Pythia-160M as the primary anchor for H1 and H2, with GPT-2 Small as secondary for H2.
Run e2_pilot: validate official absorption metric pipeline on 5 checkpoints (~15 min).
Run e2_full_gpt2 + e2_full_pythia: official absorption metric on 10-15 GPT-2 and 15-20 Pythia checkpoints (~20-30 min each).
Run e1_pilot + e1_full: SAEBench data validation and downstream causal cost meta-analysis on 200+ Pythia SAEs (~5-10 min).
Run e3_pilot: scoped task-agnostic absorption pilot (geography domain, negative-result demonstration) (~15 min).
Run e4_pilot + e4_full: supporting Pareto tradeoff analysis on Pythia-160M (~15-45 min).
